message:
refactor(harness): complete Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> migration in test suites

Adapt all harness test files and sql_pipeline_suites to the new
Arc-wrapped SqliteValue::Text(Arc<str>) and SqliteValue::Blob(Arc<[u8]>)
types: replace .clone() with .to_string()/.to_vec()/.into() as needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
